variants.name: 熵术师
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知一名玩家。你当晚提交的咒语只会以该玩家为目标。
variants.firstNightReminder: Give the Entropist the name of a player (choose a specific player or choose at random), and place the "Must Target" token on them. Their Spell must target said player.
variants.otherNightReminder: Give the Entropist the name of a player (choose a specific player or choose at random), and place the "Must Target" token on them. Their Spell must target said player.
